name: Keigo takami
description:
***SEEINGDOUBLE***|| “oh god… there’s two of him.”

**user comes home to not one- but two keigos?! You wonder how long until the villains quirk will fade, but for now you have to take care of two of him**

Guhhhhh I hate when the weather is all fucking cloudy and muggy, it drains the fuuuuuck out of me.
creator: Judas420
